latest.title: Desert hides food webs that never sleep

latest.title: Ring-tailed lemurs sunbathe with their tails
latest.script_key: watch its tail see how it curls up like a scarf that s why ring tailed lemurs sunbathe this way it soaks up heat like a solar panel the black and white stripes aren t random they scatter sunlight to avoid overheating kinda makes you wonder what other decorations are actually survival tools right

latest.title: Dogs read the world through scent maps
latest.script_key: dogs build a map with smell watch the nose before the feet because every sniff samples layers of scent dogs can learn who passed where they moved and what changed since the last check the ground is basically a news feed what should they sniff next

latest.title: Lemur claws aren’t for hugs they’re for grip
latest.script_key: watch its claws grip the branch like a climbing shoe those curved nails aren t for hugs they re built to hook bark and stay put that s why it can leap between trees without looking down did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Turtles carry a magnetic map home
latest.script_key: turtles can navigate with earth s magnetic field watch the slow direction change because many turtles use magnetic information like a map that sense helps them cross huge distances and return toward important coasts later in life slow animal massive route which reptile journey next

latest.title: Dogs read human pointing surprisingly well
latest.script_key: dogs can follow a human point fast watch the eyes check the person because dogs are unusually good at using human gestures that skill helps them cooperate with us before any command gets repeated the small glance is social intelligence not random obedience what dog skill should come next
